name: azure-review
description: Parallel Azure review covering CAF/architecture, security/governance, and operations/cost

parallel.label: CAF architecture
parallel.task:
Review the current Azure-related scope through Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework and Azure landing zone lenses. Focus on architecture, platform readiness, subscription/resource organization, networking, and adoption risks. Do not modify project/source files.

Scope: {task}

parallel.label: Security governance
parallel.task:
Review the current Azure-related scope for identity, RBAC, managed identity, Key Vault/secrets, public exposure, Azure Policy, compliance, and governance risks. Do not modify project/source files.

Scope: {task}

parallel.label: Ops cost reliability
parallel.task:
Review the current Azure-related scope for monitoring, diagnostics, backup/DR, reliability, scaling, SKU/cost risks, deployment validation, and rollback. Do not modify project/source files.

Scope: {task}
